item.title: POV: The sibling who keeps it real
item.description: POV: You’re the sibling who keeps it real at all times. Sometimes the honesty is a little too much, but who else is gonna do it?

media:content.media:title: POV: The sibling who keeps it real
media:content.media:description: POV: You’re the sibling who keeps it real at all times. Sometimes the honesty is a little too much, but who else is gonna do it?

item.title: POV: 8 AM and they’re already yelling
item.description: POV: It’s 8:00 AM and someone decides it’s the perfect time to use their megaphone voice. Why are you yelling? What is there to be that excited about?!

media:content.media:title: POV: 8 AM and they’re already yelling
media:content.media:description: POV: It’s 8:00 AM and someone decides it’s the perfect time to use their megaphone voice. Why are you yelling? What is there to be that excited about?!

item.title: When work has you clocking out mentally
item.description: POV: retail and corporate workers saying the honest thoughts they’ve definitely wanted to say to their boss. Clocking out mentally by 9:05 AM!

media:content.media:title: When work has you clocking out mentally
media:content.media:description: POV: retail and corporate workers saying the honest thoughts they’ve definitely wanted to say to their boss. Clocking out mentally by 9:05 AM!
